items.titleZh: 将智能移近传感器边缘（IBM研究院）
items.descriptionZh:
IBM欧洲研究院的研究员近日发表了题为《智能感知的新兴趋势》的综述文章，系统阐述了在人工智能、物联网设备与高速移动网络（如5G）快速普及的背景下，传统传感器架构所面临的巨大计算压力。文章指出，海量数据从传感器传至云端处理的模式正遭遇带宽瓶颈、延迟过高和能耗激增等难题，而边缘计算（Edge Computing）的兴起为这一困境提供了根本性解决方案——将计算能力直接部署在数据产生的源头，即传感器端或靠近传感器的近端节点上。

核心技术原理方面，文章深入探讨了“近传感器计算”（Near-Sensor Computing）与“传感器内处理”（In-Sensor Processing）两种路径。前者通过在传感器模组中集成轻量级AI加速器（如基于存算一体架构的ASIC或可重构神经网络处理器），在数据被模数转换前即完成部分预处理；后者则更进一步，直接在传感器像素阵列或读出电路层实现特征提取与分类，例如采用事件驱动型传感器（Event-Based Sensor）配合脉冲神经网络（SNN），仅在检测到变化时触发计算，从而大幅降低冗余数据流。创新点在于将传统“感知-传输-计算”的串行流水线重构为“感知即计算”的融合范式，并引入了自适应量化与模型剪枝技术以适配资源极度受限的传感器节点。

性能参数方面，文章引用了多组对比数据：采用边缘智能方案后，图像传感器的端到端延迟可从云端推理的200-500毫秒降至5毫秒以内；在典型智能安防摄像头场景中，数据传输量可减少至原始数据的1%至5%（仅上传告警帧或元数据），系统整体功耗降低约60%-80%。此外，通过硬件-算法协同设计（如混合精度推断与稀疏计算），边缘AI芯片的能效比可达到10-100 TOPS/W，远超传统GPU（约0.1-1 TOPS/W）。在联邦学习框架下，各传感器节点仅共享梯度而非原始数据，进一步保障了隐私安全。

技术影响与应用场景极为广泛：在工业物联网中，边缘传感器可实时监测设备振动并预测故障，而无需依赖中心服务器；在自动驾驶领域，车载激光雷达与摄像头利用近传感器推理实现毫秒级行人检测与避障；在医疗可穿戴设备中，心电图（ECG）传感器可直接在芯片上识别心律失常，仅在必要时向手机或云端发送警报。文章最后强调，随着存内计算、神经形态硬件和先进封装技术的成熟，智能传感器将具备更丰富的片上学习能力，推动从“智能传感”向“自主感知”的跨越，这将是下一代物联网与AI系统迈向实用化的关键基石。

items.author: Technical Paper Link
items.titleZh: 用于超低功耗边缘Transformer模型快速推理的灵活AI微控制器（苏黎世联邦理工学院，博洛尼亚
items.descriptionZh:
苏黎世联邦理工学院（ETH Zurich）与博洛尼亚大学（University of Bologna）的研究团队联合发布了“CHIMERA：一种灵活可扩展的3.1 TOPS/W AI-MCU，配备Transformer加速器和具有QoS保证的563 Gb/s共享L2内存子系统”。该芯片专为超低功耗边缘设备上的实时推理而设计，旨在应对快速演进的Transformer模型对高效算力的迫切需求。

CHIMERA本质上是一款高度可编程的微控制器单元（MCU），但其内部集成了专门针对Transformer架构优化的神经网络加速器，这使其超越了传统MCU的能力。其核心技术亮点在于：采用了一种灵活且可扩展的异构计算架构，将通用MCU核心与专用Transformer加速单元紧密结合，并通过一个带宽高达563 Gb/s的共享L2内存子系统实现数据高速交换。该内存子系统内置服务质量（QoS）保证机制，可确保在混合工作负载下关键推理任务获得稳定的带宽和低延迟，从而避免因资源争抢导致的实时性能下降。

性能参数方面，CHIMERA实现了3.1 TOPS/W的能效比，这意味着在维持每秒万亿次运算能力的同时，功耗控制在了极低水平。相较于现有边缘AI芯片，其共享L2内存带宽（563 Gb/s）尤为突出，能够高效支持Transformer模型中密集的注意力计算和跨层数据流动。通过灵活的加速器设计，该芯片可适配不同规模的Transformer变体（如BERT、ViT等），无需重新流片。

从技术影响看，CHIMERA填补了传统MCU无法处理大型Transformer模型、而GPU或云端NPU功耗过高不适用于边缘场景的空白。其应用场景包括：可穿戴设备上的实时语音识别与自然语言理解、智能传感器中的视觉Transformer推理、工业物联网中的边缘预测性维护，以及具备上下文感知能力的超低功耗智能家居终端。通过将Transformer推理能力下放到微瓦级功耗的MCU上，CHIMERA有望推动新一代超低功耗AI应用的普及，使边缘设备在不依赖云连接的情况下自主执行高级语义理解任务。

items.title: Microsoft Build 2026: The 7 biggest announcements
items.description:
Microsoft just kicked off Build 2026 with a keynote from CEO Satya Nadella and other company leaders. As expected, it was filled with announcements, ranging from new Surface hardware to an always-on personal assistant and updates across Microsoft's in-house AI models.
If you didn't watch the event live, you can catch up on all the latest news in the roundup below.
A mini Surface PC designed for AI development
The Surface RTX Spark Dev Box is geared toward developers who want to run local AI models on their device, serving as a substitute for Qualcomm's canceled dev kit. It comes equipped with Nvidia's new Arm-based Spark RTX chip and 128G …
Read the full story at The Verge.
items.content: Microsoft just kicked off Build 2026 with a keynote from CEO Satya Nadella and other company leaders. As expected, it was filled with announcements, ranging from new Surface hardware to an always-on personal assistant and updates across Microsoft’s in-house AI models.If you didn’t watch the event live, you can catch up on all the latest news in the roundup below.A mini Surface PC designed for AI developmentImage: MicrosoftThe Surface RTX Spark Dev Box is geared toward developers who want to run local AI models on their device, serving as a substitute for Qualcomm’s canceled dev kit. It comes equipped with Nvidia’s new Arm-based Spark RTX chip and 128GB of unified memory, along with preinstalled apps like Visual Studio Code and GitHub Copilot. The Surface RTX Spark Dev Box also has a preconfigured version of Windows 11 Pro with dark mode enabled by default, a simplified taskbar, and no widgets.Microsoft hasn’t revealed pricing or the full list of specs yet, but the device will be available in the US later this year.Developer-optimized Windows updatesThe new Intelligent Terminal. Screenshot: The VergeMicrosoft is taking steps to make Windows more developer-friendly. That includes the addition of Coreutils, which the company describes as “Linux-like command-line utilities that run natively” on Windows 11. It’s also launching the ability to create, run, and interact with Linux containers through its Windows Subsystem for Linux (WSL), along with a new Intelligent Terminal that provides context to a developer’s preferred AI-powered agent.An OS designed to connect AI agents across devicesWe got a glimpse at Project Solara, an Android-based operating system designed to run agents across a variety of devices. Microsoft partnered with Qualcomm and MediaTek to develop the system, which could eventually work as a companion to a PC or hand off tasks between devices. During the keynote, Microsoft showed off a couple of sample devices that the tech might run on: a desktop hub and a digital badge.Microsoft jumps on the OpenClaw bandwagon with ScoutMicrosoft is launching an always-on assistant built on OpenClaw, the open-source AI platform that gained popularity earlier this year. The assistant, called Scout, works with Microsoft 365 apps including Outlook, OneDrive, and Microsoft Teams. It’s designed to perform tasks in the background, helping businesses do things like organize calendars, manage expense reporting, write emails, and more.Scout is part of a broader set of “Autopilot” agents that Microsoft plans on launching, each of which will have its own “identity.” For now, Scout is launching in desktop preview for Frontier customers in the US, but Microsoft plans to eventually make it available to more people.Microsoft’s first in-house reasoning AI modelMicrosoft is pushing ahead with its work to make its own AI models instead of relying on those created by OpenAI. It revealed seven new models during Build, including one that it says is its first reasoning model. MAI-Thinking-1 offers 35 billion active parameters and a 128K context window that Microsoft says is designed for “complex multi-step instructions, long-context reasoning and code generation.” It also announced updates across its models focused on image, voice, and code generation, as well as transcription.Windows adds guardrails for OpenClaw and other AI agentsOpenClaw on Windows. Screenshot: The VergeSpeaking of OpenClaw, Microsoft is trying to make the AI agents safer to run through something called Microsoft Execution Containers (MXC). This allows developers to set guardrails for what AI agents can access on their devices. Microsoft is also launching an OpenClaw companion app that will allow you to set up your own agent or connect to existing ones, which will run in a sandboxed environment.A more stable quantum computing chipImage: MicrosoftMicrosoft revealed its next-gen quantum computing chip, called Majorana 2, which the company says could speed up its progress in the field. The upgraded chip contains qubits — the units of information in quantum computing — that are 1,000 times more accurate. Microsoft attributes the boost in performance to a new material stack that uses lead and other compounds.With the way things are progressing, Microsoft says it could reach its goal of making a practical quantum computer by 2029.
items.author: Emma Roth
items.descriptionZh:
微软在Build 2026开发者大会上发布了一系列重磅产品和技术更新，涵盖硬件、操作系统、AI模型、量子计算等多个领域。CEO萨提亚·纳德拉在主旨演讲中展示了微软从芯片到应用的全栈AI布局，标志着公司正加速从依赖外部合作转向自主技术研发。

**AI开发硬件：Surface RTX Spark Dev Box**  
微软专为本地运行AI模型的开发者推出了Surface RTX Spark Dev Box，这款迷你PC旨在替代高通此前取消的开发者套件。其核心搭载英伟达全新的Arm架构Spark RTX芯片，并配备高达128GB的统一内存，可高效处理大规模AI推理任务。设备预装Visual Studio Code、GitHub Copilot等开发工具，并预配置了默认开启深色模式、简化任务栏、无小部件的Windows 11 Pro系统。微软尚未公布具体定价和完整规格，但该设备将于今年晚些时候在美国上市。这一举措为开发者提供了在本地部署和调试AI模型的高性能终端，解决了云端延迟和数据隐私问题。

**Windows开发者体验升级**  
微软在Windows 11中增加了多项面向开发者的功能：引入Coreutils（原生运行在Windows上的类Linux命令行工具），让开发者无需虚拟机即可使用熟悉的Unix命令；通过Windows子系统Linux（WSL）实现创建、运行和交互Linux容器的能力；全新智能终端（Intelligent Terminal）能够为开发者偏好的AI代理提供上下文感知的辅助，例如自动补全命令、解释错误信息或建议调试方案。这些更新显著降低了Windows平台上的跨平台开发门槛，尤其适合混合使用Windows和Linux环境的AI工程师。

**跨设备AI代理操作系统：Project Solara**  
微软与高通、联发科合作开发了基于Android的操作系统Project Solara，专为在多种设备上运行AI代理而设计。该系统能够作为PC的协同设备，或在手机、桌面集线器、数字徽章等设备间无缝交接任务。在演示中，微软展示了两种原型设备：一个桌面集线器和一个可佩戴的数字徽章。Project Solara的核心创新在于其分布式代理架构，AI模型可在不同设备间动态迁移，例如让手机上的会议提醒自动同步到桌面集线器，或通过数字徽章进行身份验证后调用PC上的AI助手。这为多设备生态下的智能体协作提供了底层操作系统支持。

**基于OpenClaw的AI助手Scout**  
微软推出了基于开源AI平台OpenClaw的始终在线助手Scout，它能够与Microsoft 365应用（Outlook、OneDrive、Teams等）深度集成。Scout旨在后台运行，自动完成日程整理、费用报告管理、邮件撰写等企业办公任务。它属于微软“自动驾驶代理”（Autopilot Agents）计划的一部分，每个代理都拥有独立身份标识。目前Scout仅在美国向特定“前沿”客户提供桌面预览版，未来将逐步开放。OpenClaw作为新兴的开源代理平台，允许开发者定义自定义工具和权限，Scout是其首个大规模企业级落地应用。

**微软首款自研推理AI模型：MAI-Thinking-1**  
微软发布了七款新模型，其中MAI-Thinking-1是其首款推理模型，标志着微软减少对OpenAI依赖、构建自主AI能力的重大突破。该模型拥有350亿活跃参数（采用混合专家架构）和128K上下文窗口，专门针对复杂多步指令、长上下文推理和代码生成进行优化。与主流推理模型（如OpenAI o1）相比，微软强调其在特定硬件（如Spark RTX芯片）上的高效部署能力。其余六个模型覆盖图像生成、语音合成、代码补全和转录等任务，形成完整的自有模型矩阵。这一举措让微软在训练成本、数据隐私和垂直领域定制上拥有更大自主权。

**AI代理安全防护：微软执行容器（MXC）与OpenClaw伴侣应用**  
为了确保AI代理运行的安全性，微软推出了微软执行容器（MXC），允许开发者设置AI代理可访问的系统资源边界（如文件系统、网络、API）。同时，微软发布了OpenClaw伴侣应用，用户可在沙箱环境中创建或连接现有AI代理。这些容器技术基于Windows内核的隔离机制，确保即使代理被恶意利用，也无法影响宿主系统。这解决了企业担忧的AI代理权限过大、可能泄露敏感信息的安全问题。

**下一代量子计算芯片：Majorana 2**  
微软公布了其新一代量子计算芯片Majorana 2，采用基于铅和其他化合物的新材料堆叠，使量子比特（qubit）的准确性提升了1000倍。量子比特的稳定性是量子计算实用化的最大瓶颈，Majorana 2通过拓扑量子比特技术（利用准粒子Majorana费米子）极大地降低了错误率。微软据此表示，其目标是在2029年前制造出实用的量子计算机。与谷歌、IBM采用的超导量子比特路径不同，微软的拓扑方案理论上可实现更低的错误率和更好的可扩展性，尽管实现难度更高。这一进展使量子计算在药物发现、材料科学和密码学等领域的实用化迈出关键一步。

items.title: NVIDIA Partners With Microsoft on Unified Stack for Agentic AI Deployment, From Windows Devices to Cloud to Local
items.description: The agentic AI moment has arrived, but delivering on its promise requires more than good models. It also takes fast hardware, secure runtimes, a responsive data layer and models tuned for long-running reasoning. NVIDIA and Microsoft are bringing that full stack to developers across Windows devices, Azure cloud and local deployments. At Microsoft Build, NVIDIA […]
items.content: The agentic AI moment has arrived, but delivering on its promise requires more than good models. It also takes fast hardware, secure runtimes, a responsive data layer and models tuned for long-running reasoning. NVIDIA and Microsoft are bringing that full stack to developers across Windows devices, Azure cloud and local deployments. At Microsoft Build, NVIDIA founder and CEO Jensen Huang joined Microsoft chairman and CEO Satya Nadella’s keynote via livestream from Taipei to discuss the expanded partnership: NVIDIA RTX Spark and DGX Station for Windows, NVIDIA GPU-accelerated Microsoft Fabric, NVIDIA open models on Microsoft Foundry, the NVIDIA OpenShell secure runtime in GitHub Copilot and the next generation of NVIDIA-powered AI factories. Reinventing Windows for Agents: From RTX Spark to DGX Station for Windows NVIDIA and Microsoft are reimagining Windows PCs for the age of AI agents. With RTX Spark laptops and small desktops, and DGX Station for Windows deskside AI supercomputers, developers can build, tune and run agents natively on Windows. RTX Spark is a new beginning, powering the world’s first Windows PCs purpose-built for personal agents, with 1 petaflop of AI performance, up to 128GB of unified memory, all-day battery life, and full AI and graphics performance unplugged. Bringing over 30 years of NVIDIA innovation, including CUDA, RTX, DLSS and TensorRT, systems arrive this fall from Microsoft Surface, ASUS, Dell, HP, Lenovo and MSI. DGX Station for Windows is the most powerful deskside AI supercomputer for building and running agents on Windows enterprise applications and workflows. Powered by the NVIDIA GB300 Grace Blackwell Ultra Desktop Superchip with up to 748GB of coherent memory and 20 petaflops of FP4 performance, it runs frontier models of up to 1 trillion parameters for always-on enterprise agents. Systems are expected from ASUS, Dell, GIGABYTE, HP, MSI and Supermicro in Q4. Both products run NVIDIA OpenShell, a secure-by-design runtime for autonomous agents. Read more in this Microsoft blog: “Introducing a powerful new chapter for Windows PCs, accelerated by NVIDIA RTX Spark” Powering Agentic Workflows at Enterprise Scale With NVIDIA Open Models on Microsoft Foundry Agentic AI runs on a system of models. With NVIDIA, Anthropic and OpenAI models — plus Hermes special agents — now on the hosted agents in Foundry Agent Service, enterprises can bring agentic systems to life on Azure with built-in identity and governance. Anthropic’s Claude models now run natively on NVIDIA GB300 Blackwell Ultra systems on Azure, with customer availability in the weeks ahead. NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra, a new open frontier reasoning model for long-running agents across coding, research and enterprise workflows, is available this month on Foundry managed compute, alongside Nemotron 3.5 ASR for speech recognition and Nemotron 3.5 Content Safety. Developers can compose Nemotron alongside frontier and local models, optimizing cost and quality for each workflow. NVIDIA’s open model portfolio on Foundry now spans agentic, physical and scientific AI. NVIDIA Cosmos 3, the first fully open omnimodel for physical AI, brings vision reasoning, world simulation and action generation. NVIDIA Earth-2 AI weather models are available through Microsoft Planetary Computer Pro and Foundry for enterprise forecasting and risk analysis. NVIDIA Agent Toolkit and NVIDIA NemoClaw blueprints give developers an open source platform to build production agents on Foundry. NVIDIA CUDA-X libraries including cuDF, cuOpt, AI-Q and NeMo are now accessible to agents as domain-specific skills. Learn more in this Build breakout session: “Orchestrate Special Agents with NVIDIA Nemotron Models on Microsoft Foundry.” Accelerating Enterprise Data Warehouses for the AI Era Data fuels agentic AI, and fast access to it is critical. NVIDIA accelerated computing is now built into Microsoft Fabric Data Warehouse, with Microsoft’s internal benchmarking delivering SQL execution up to 6x faster than the CPU-powered baseline and up to 7x faster than three other leading cloud data warehouse providers for high-concurrency workloads. The enterprise data layer can now keep pace with AI agents that continuously query and reason over data, the result of years of deep engineering collaboration between NVIDIA and Microsoft, from research to production. Read more in this Microsoft blog: “Microsoft Build 2026: Building agentic apps with Microsoft Fabric and Microsoft Databases” Advancing Physical AI and Autonomous Systems Physical AI is the next frontier for agents. Microsoft is integrating NVIDIA’s open source physical AI skills and tools with Azure and its Physical AI Toolchain. Developers get a unified platform, powered by Cosmos 3’s mixture-of-transformers architecture, to simulate, train and deploy autonomous systems, including robots, autonomous vehicles and industrial systems that can perceive, reason, plan and act in the physical world. Cosmos 3 ranks first among open models on key benchmarks for vision reasoning, world generation and action generation. Enhancing Azure Local and Foundry Local With NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edition and Nemotron Models Agentic AI is moving beyond the cloud. Microsoft is bringing Foundry Local on Azure Local to the NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edition platform. Paired with the NVIDIA Nemotron open model family, enterprises can run high-performance AI workloads where their data resides, whether in on-premises, hybrid or sovereign environments, without sacrificing performance or governance. Foundry Local on Azure Local now supports multinode deployments and the vLLM runtime, scaling inference for manufacturing, energy, sovereign data centers and other latency-sensitive scenarios. Learn more in these Microsoft blogs: “Unlocking the possibilities of physical AI with Foundry Local and Azure Local,” “Scale On-Prem AI with Foundry Local on Azure Local” Bringing Secure Agent Development to GitHub Copilot With NVIDIA OpenShell As agents move from coding assistance to autonomous execution, they need real capability without real credentials. NVIDIA OpenShell, now integrated into GitHub Copilot, solves this: Each agent runs isolated in its own sandboxed container, and every outbound call is evaluated against policy before it can reach files, networks or credentials. Policies are written as code, versioned in the repository and updatable on the fly. OpenShell is open source under Apache 2.0, model-agnostic and spans on-premises, hybrid and cloud environments. Learn more in this Build lightning session: “Secure Agent Workflows with GitHub Copilot and NVIDIA OpenShell.” Fairwater Wisconsin Goes Live, Validated for NVIDIA Vera Rubin Microsoft’s Fairwater Wisconsin AI factory is now live, ahead of schedule, running hundreds of thousands of NVIDIA Grace Blackwell systems as a single AI factory, and connected with a similar AI factory in Georgia to deliver a scalable and distributed AI system for the most demanding frontier models. Through joint engineering on power, cooling, NVIDIA Spectrum-X Ethernet and the new Multipath Reliable Connection (MRC) transport protocol, Microsoft’s Fairwater AI data center designs are optimizing token economics. In addition, Microsoft has already validated the NVIDIA Vera Rubin platform, now in full production, for deployment across Azure data centers. Vera Rubin slots in alongside Blackwell with no retrofits, delivering up to 10x inference throughput per megawatt and reducing cost per agentic token by an order of magnitude. Built-in NVIDIA Confidential Computing protects models and data as agents reason at scale. The NVIDIA Dynamo inference framework extends those gains into software, accelerating model cold starts on AKS and bringing Kubernetes-native distributed inference orchestration via NVIDIA Grove. Read more in this Microsoft blog: “Scaling multi-node LLM inference with NVIDIA Dynamo-Grove on AKS (Part 4)” Explore the full lineup of NVIDIA sessions, demos and hands-on labs at Microsoft Build.
items.author: Dave Salvator
items.titleZh: 英伟达与微软合作推出统一栈，用于从Windows设备到云端到本地的代理式AI部署
items.descriptionZh:
AI代理时代已经到来，但兑现其潜力不仅需要优秀的模型，还需要快速的硬件、安全的运行时环境、响应灵敏的数据层以及针对长时间推理优化的模型。NVIDIA与微软正将这套全栈方案带给Windows设备、Azure云和本地部署的开发者。在微软Build大会上，NVIDIA创始人兼CEO黄仁勋从台北通过直播连线，与微软董事长兼CEO萨提亚·纳德拉共同宣布了多项深化合作：包括NVIDIA RTX Spark和DGX Station for Windows、NVIDIA GPU加速的Microsoft Fabric、Microsoft Foundry上的NVIDIA开源模型、GitHub Copilot中的NVIDIA OpenShell安全运行时，以及下一代NVIDIA驱动的AI工厂。

### 为代理重新定义Windows：从RTX Spark到DGX Station for Windows
NVIDIA和微软正为AI代理时代重新构想Windows PC。搭载RTX Spark的笔记本电脑和小型台式机，以及DGX Station for Windows桌面级AI超级计算机，让开发者可以直接在Windows上构建、调优和运行代理。RTX Spark是一个全新起点，驱动全球首批专为个人代理设计的Windows PC：拥有1 petaflop的AI算力、最高128GB的统一内存、全天候电池续航，并且在脱离电源时仍能保持完整AI和图形性能。这些系统集成了NVIDIA超过30年的创新成果，包括CUDA、RTX、DLSS和TensorRT，将于今年秋季由微软Surface、华硕、戴尔、惠普、联想和微星等厂商推出。DGX Station for Windows则是功能最强大的桌面级AI超级计算机，专为在Windows企业应用和工作流中构建和运行代理而设计。它搭载NVIDIA GB300 Grace Blackwell Ultra桌面超级芯片，拥有最高748GB的一致性内存和20 petaflops的FP4算力，可运行高达1万亿参数的前沿模型，为始终在线的企业代理提供动力。华硕、戴尔、技嘉、惠普、微星和超微等厂商预计在第四季度推出相关系统。两款产品均运行NVIDIA OpenShell——一个安全设计的自主代理运行时环境。

### 以企业级规模运行代理工作流：微软Foundry上的NVIDIA开源模型
代理型AI依赖于模型系统。随着NVIDIA、Anthropic和OpenAI的模型——以及Hermes专用代理——现已入驻Foundry代理服务中的托管代理，企业可以在Azure上以内置身份和治理功能启动代理系统。Anthropic的Claude模型现已在Azure上的NVIDIA GB300 Blackwell Ultra系统上原生运行，客户数周内即可使用。NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra是一款新的开源前沿推理模型，适用于编码、研究和企业工作流中的长时间运行代理，本月已在Foundry托管计算上可用，同时上线的还有用于语音识别的Nemotron 3.5 ASR和内容安全的Nemotron 3.5 Content Safety。开发者可以将Nemotron与前沿模型及本地模型组合，优化每个工作流的成本和质量。NVIDIA在Foundry上的开源模型组合现已涵盖代理AI、物理AI和科学AI。NVIDIA Cosmos 3是首个完全开源的物理AI全模态模型，具备视觉推理、世界模拟和动作生成能力。NVIDIA Earth-2 AI气象模型已通过微软行星计算机Pro和Foundry提供，用于企业预测和风险分析。NVIDIA Agent工具包和NVIDIA NemoClaw蓝图为开发者在Foundry上构建生产级代理提供了开源平台。NVIDIA CUDA-X库（包括cuDF、cuOpt、AI-Q和NeMo）现可作为领域特定技能供代理调用。

### 为AI时代加速企业数据仓库
数据驱动代理型AI，快速访问数据至关重要。NVIDIA加速计算现已内置于Microsoft Fabric数据仓库中，微软内部基准测试显示，与纯CPU基线相比，SQL执行速度提升高达6倍；在高并发工作负载下，比另外三家领先的云数据仓库提供商快高达7倍。这一企业数据层如今能够跟上不断查询和推理数据的AI代理节奏——这是NVIDIA与微软多年从研究到生产的深度工程合作成果。

### 推进物理AI与自主系统
物理AI是代理的下一个前沿。微软正在将NVIDIA的开源物理AI技能和工具与Azure及其物理AI工具链整合。开发者将获得一个统一平台，基于Cosmos 3的混合专家变换器架构，用于模拟、训练和部署自主系统，包括机器人、自动驾驶汽车和工业系统，使其能够感知、推理、规划并在物理世界中行动。Cosmos 3在视觉推理、世界生成和动作生成等关键基准测试中位居开源模型之首。

### 借助NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell服务器版和Nemotron模型增强Azure Local与Foundry Local
代理型AI正向云端之外扩展。微软将Foundry Local（基于Azure Local）引入NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell服务器版平台。结合NVIDIA Nemotron开源模型家族，企业可以在数据所在位置运行高性能AI工作负载，无论是本地、混合还是主权环境，且不牺牲性能或治理能力。Foundry Local on Azure Local现支持多节点部署和vLLM运行时，可扩展至制造、能源、主权数据中心等对延迟敏感的场景。

### 将安全代理开发引入GitHub Copilot：NVIDIA OpenShell
随着代理从代码辅助转向自主执行，它们需要真实能力而非真实凭证。现已集成到GitHub Copilot中的NVIDIA OpenShell解决了这一问题：每个代理在其独立的沙箱容器中运行，每次对外调用在接触文件、网络或凭证前都会根据策略进行评估。策略以代码形式编写，在仓库中版本化管理，并可实时更新。OpenShell基于Apache 2.0开源，与模型无关，覆盖本地、混合和云环境。

### Fairwater威斯康星AI工厂投产，并完成NVIDIA Vera Rubin验证
微软位于威斯康星州的Fairwater AI工厂已提前投产，运行着数十万个NVIDIA Grace Blackwell系统，作为一个单一的AI工厂运行，并与佐治亚州的类似AI工厂相连，为最具挑战的前沿模型提供可扩展的分布式AI系统。通过在电力、冷却、NVIDIA Spectrum-X以太网以及全新多路径可靠连接（MRC）传输协议上的联合工程，微软的Fairwater AI数据中心设计正在优化token经济性。此外，微软已完成NVIDIA Vera Rubin平台的验证，该平台现已全面投产，可在Azure数据中心部署。Vera Rubin与Blackwell无缝配合，无需改造，每兆瓦推理吞吐量提升高达10倍，并将每个代理token的成本降低一个数量级。内置的NVIDIA机密计算可在代理大规模推理时保护模型和数据。NVIDIA Dynamo推理框架将这些优势扩展到软件层面，加速AKS上的模型冷启动，并通过NVIDIA Grove实现Kubernetes原生的分布式推理编排。

完整内容可参阅微软Build大会上NVIDIA的系列主题演讲、演示和动手实验室。

items.title: Asus unveils its first Wi-Fi 8 router — ROG Rapture GT-BN98 Pro offers up to 2x real-world throughput uplift over Wi-Fi 7
items.description: Wi-Fi 8 is aimed at improving real-world performance over Wi-Fi 7
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 0 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter Now that Wi-Fi 7 has been on the market for a few years and has matured, Wi-Fi 8 is the next logical step in the quest to advance wireless connectivity. TP-Link teased its upcoming Archer 8 Wi-Fi 8 router last week, and now Asus has pulled the wraps off its upcoming ROG Rapture GT-BN98 Pro gaming router.At first glance, the ROG Rapture GT-BN98 Pro doesn’t look too far removed from the ROG Rapture GT-BE98 Pro Wi-Fi 7 router. They seemingly share the exact exterior design, right down to the eight antennas, front LED panel, buttons, exposed heatsink, and clear ROG panel. However, Asus is using an unnamed Wi-Fi 8 chipset inside.Asus hasn’t provided any concrete performance figures we can compare to its existing Wi-Fi 7 routers, but it does offer some broad generalizations. It claims that the ROG Rapture GT-BN98 Pro offers up to a 2x improvement in median throughput and 2x greater coverage for IoT devices. Asus also claims that it will provide lower latency via Multi-AP coordination and allow higher performance in crowded wireless environments. These are all enhancements afforded by the Wi-Fi 8 standard, rather than anything that Asus is doing on its own to improve performance.Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: You may like TP-Link announces its first consumer Wi-Fi 8 roadmap The Best Wi-Fi Routers We've Benchmarked in 2026 — the best of Wi-Fi 7 from budget to premium MSI unveils latest set of WiFi 7 gaming routers touting ultra-fast speeds (Image credit: Tom's Hardware)That’s not to say that Asus has sprinkled its own magic on the ROG Rapture GT-BN98 Pro. Asus has a collection of tools at its disposal that it lumps under the AI Game Boost feature. The ROG Rapture GT-BN98 Pro can automatically optimize and accelerate gaming traffic over the physical LAN ports and via Wi-Fi. There’s also adaptive QoS, which provides on-demand bandwidth allocation and network optimizations for specific online games using GTNet.While all the major performance benefits come from the wireless side, the ROG Rapture GT-BN98 Pro also has relatively beefy wired networking capabilities. The router includes four 2.5 GbE LAN ports (one of which can be used for WAN), a 1 GbE LAN port, a 10 GbE LAN/Gaming port, and a 10 GbE WAN port. The two 10 GbE ports can be aggregated to form a single 20 Gbps link. In addition, the ROG Rapture GT-BN98 Pro has a single USB 2.0 port and one USB 3.0 port.Although Asus hasn’t provided any further guidance, we expect the ROG Rapture GT-BN98 Pro to launch in Q4 2026 or possibly Q1 2027. items.titleZh: 华硕发布首款Wi-Fi 8路由器——ROG Rapture GT-BN98 Pro，实际吞吐量比Wi-Fi 7提升最多2倍
items.descriptionZh:
随着Wi-Fi 7技术经历数年市场发展已趋于成熟，下一代无线通信标准Wi-Fi 8的推进成为行业新焦点。继TP-Link上周预告其首款Wi-Fi 8消费级路由器Archer 8后，华硕也正式揭开了旗下ROG Rapture GT-BN98 Pro游戏路由器的面纱。从外观上看，这款Wi-Fi 8路由器与现有的ROG Rapture GT-BE98 Pro Wi-Fi 7路由器几乎如出一辙，共享相同的八天线设计、前面板LED灯阵、按键布局、裸露散热鳍片以及透明ROG面板。核心差异在于内部搭载了尚未命名的Wi-Fi 8芯片组。

华硕并未公开与现有Wi-Fi 7路由器直接对比的具体性能数值，但给出了宏观性能声称：中位吞吐量提升高达2倍，对物联网设备的覆盖范围扩大2倍。此外，通过多接入点（Multi-AP）协调技术，该路由器能够实现更低延迟，并在拥挤的无线环境中提供更高性能。这些改进本质上源于Wi-Fi 8标准本身的增强特性，而非华硕独有的硬件优化。

尽管如此，华硕也在软件层面注入了自家技术。ROG Rapture GT-BN98 Pro集成了AI Game Boost功能套件，能够自动优化并加速通过物理LAN端口和Wi-Fi的游戏流量。此外，自适应QoS（服务质量）技术通过GTNet，可针对特定在线游戏按需分配带宽并实施网络优化，实现更精准的网络资源调度。

在有线网络方面，该路由器同样具备强悍的配置：提供四个2.5GbE LAN端口（其中一个可兼作WAN口）、一个1GbE LAN端口、一个10GbE LAN/游戏专用端口以及一个10GbE WAN端口。两个10GbE端口可以聚合形成单一20Gbps链路，满足极高速率需求。此外还配备一个USB 2.0端口和一个USB 3.0端口。

虽然华硕尚未提供更多上市细节，但业界预计ROG Rapture GT-BN98 Pro将于2026年第四季度或2027年第一季度正式发售。该路由器的发布将Wi-Fi 8标准从概念推向消费级产品，有望在高端游戏、物联网密集部署、多设备并发等场景中带来显著的性能提升。对于追求极致无线体验的用户而言，Wi-Fi 8时代的大门已悄然开启。

items.content: Microsoft announced a bunch of new in-house AI models at Build 2026, including a new “flagship” model: MAI-Thinking-1. It’s an ambitious step into model development for Microsoft, which introduced its initial in-house models last year — before then, it had relied on OpenAI’s models. The two companies recently renegotiated their deal to loosen ties.According to Microsoft, MAI-Thinking-1 is a “medium-sized model” that “matches leading models” on “key” software engineering benchmarks. Microsoft says the company “trained it from the ground up on clean data, without distillation from third-party models.”As for other models announced today, they’re focused on image generation, transcription, voice, and coding.MAI-Image 2.5 and the flash version can do text-to-image and image editing. MAI-Transcribe-1.5 is “five times faster than competing models.” MAI-Voice-2 and the flash version of that model (which Microsoft says is “coming soon”) add 15 new languages and new options for voices. The new coding model, MAI-Code-1-Flash, is “inference-efficient” and is integrated into GitHub Copilot and Visual Studio Code.
items.author: Jay Peters
items.titleZh: 微软首个高级推理AI已登场
items.descriptionZh:
微软在Build 2026开发者大会上发布了多款自研AI模型，标志着其从长期依赖OpenAI向独立模型开发迈出关键一步。去年微软首次推出内部模型，而在此之前其AI能力几乎完全建立在OpenAI的技术之上。两家公司近期重新谈判了合作协议，有意放松彼此绑定关系。

此次发布的旗舰模型名为**MAI-Thinking-1**。微软称这是一款“中等规模”的模型，在“关键”软件工程基准测试中“与领先模型旗鼓相当”。其核心技术亮点在于：微软从头开始使用“干净数据”训练该模型，未从任何第三方模型进行知识蒸馏——这意味着模型的知识与推理能力完全来自自主收集和清洗的数据，避免了依赖其他大模型输出结果所可能引入的偏差或版权问题。这种训练方式有助于建立更可控、更可审计的模型基础。

除旗舰模型外，微软还推出了多个垂直领域模型：

- **MAI-Image 2.5及Flash版本**：支持文生图（text-to-image）和图像编辑功能，延续了自研视觉生成能力。
- **MAI-Transcribe-1.5**：转录模型，微软声称其速度比竞品快5倍，适用于实时语音转文字等场景。
- **MAI-Voice-2及Flash版本**（后者“即将推出”）：新增15种语言支持，并提供更多语音选项，拓展多语言语音交互能力。
- **MAI-Code-1-Flash**：面向编程的模型，强调“推理高效”（inference-efficient），已集成到GitHub Copilot和Visual Studio Code中，旨在提升开发者编码辅助的响应速度与资源利用率。

这些模型的发布体现了微软在AI领域的战略转变：从单一的OpenAI合作关系转向多模型、自研为主的技术栈。通过MAI-Thinking-1在软件工程基准上的表现，微软试图证明其自研能力已能对标业界顶尖水平。同时，图像、语音、编码等专用模型覆盖了从创作到开发的完整工作流，有助于微软在Azure云服务、开发者工具（GitHub/VS Code）以及Copilot生态中提供更自主可控的AI能力。对用户而言，这意味着更快的转录速度、更丰富的语言支持以及更高效的代码辅助，同时也降低了对外部模型供应商的长期依赖风险。

items.title: Microsoft debuts Surface RTX Spark Dev Box — Nvidia-powered mini-PC helps devs get ready for an agentic Windows
items.description: At Microsoft Build, the company debuted its Surface RTX Spark Dev Box, a system for developers to come up with new AI applications.
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 4 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter ,Following the announcement of Microsoft's Surface Laptop Ultra ahead of Computex, the company is announcing another device with the RTX Spark system on a chip at its developer conference, Build, in San Francisco.That new PC is the Surface RTX Spark Dev Box. With the company pushing Windows as a platform for agentic AI with Nvidia's new processor, the Surface-branded mini PC is set to run sustained workloads with a 100W thermal envelope — more than you can get in a laptop. Microsoft says that includes "long-running training jobs, agentic AI pipelines and local model fine-tuning."Image 1 of 3(Image credit: Microsoft)(Image credit: Microsoft)(Image credit: Microsoft)The PC has an aluminum chassis with 1,000 air vents in a grid, which looks a bit like the flat top of the Xbox Series X. The system features two USB Type-C ports, HDMI, USB-A, Ethernet, and a headphone jack. Nvidia states that the RTX Spark can deliver up to one petaflop of AI compute with 128GB of unified memory and can run models with up to 120 billion parameters locally.The system will come set up for developers, with Visual Studio Code, GitHub Copilot, and other applications preinstalled. Windows Subsystem for Linux 2 (WSL 2) with support for Nvidia's CUDA technology will also come out of the box, along with PowerShell7.Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: You may like Microsoft Surface Laptop Ultra weilds Nvidia's RTX Spark superchip with 128GB of RAM, 20 Arm CPU cores, and a Blackwell GPU Nvidia unveils RTX Spark Superchip for laptops and desktop PCs at Computex 2026 Nvidia's RTX Spark could caplitalize where Qualcomm's Arm-based efforts have not Microsoft hasn't announced a price for the Surface RTX Spark Dev Box, but says it will be available this year at microsoft.com in the United States. While you can't make a pre-order, you can sign up to learn more on the device's web page. items.titleZh: 微软推出Surface RTX Spark Dev Box — 搭载Nvidia的迷你PC帮助开发者备战智能代理Windows
items.descriptionZh:
在Computex大会前夕宣布Surface Laptop Ultra之后，微软在旧金山举行的Build开发者大会上又推出了一款搭载Nvidia RTX Spark系统级芯片的新设备——Surface RTX Spark Dev Box。这款迷你PC旨在配合微软将Windows打造成智能代理AI平台（借助Nvidia新款处理器）的战略，能够以100W热设计功耗持续运行高负载任务，这超过了普通笔记本电脑的散热能力。微软表示，这包括“长时间训练作业、智能代理AI流水线和本地模型微调”。

该设备采用铝制机箱，顶盖布满1000个通风孔构成的网格，外观类似Xbox Series X的平坦顶部。接口方面配备了两个USB-C端口、HDMI、USB-A、以太网接口以及耳机插孔。Nvidia宣称，RTX Spark可提供高达1 petaflop的AI算力，配备128GB统一内存，能够在本地运行参数规模高达1200亿的模型。

系统出厂即为开发者配置好，预装了Visual Studio Code、GitHub Copilot等应用。同时预装支持Nvidia CUDA技术的Windows Subsystem for Linux 2（WSL 2）以及PowerShell 7。微软尚未公布Surface RTX Spark Dev Box的售价，但表示将于今年在美国微软官网开售。目前尚不能预购，但用户可在产品页面上注册以获取更多信息。

从技术原理上看，RTX Spark是Nvidia专为桌面和笔记本打造的超级芯片，融合了Blackwell架构GPU和Arm CPU核心（此前Surface Laptop Ultra已确认其拥有20个Arm CPU核心）。其统一内存架构允许CPU和GPU共享128GB内存，无需在显存和系统内存之间复制数据，从而大幅提升AI推理和训练的效率。100W的热设计功耗意味着它可以在静音散热条件下持续运行专业级AI工作负载，相比之下，笔记本通常受限于更低的功耗阈值。

这一设备的核心创新在于将高端AI算力从云环境引入本地桌面，专为开发者打造。它能够流畅运行120B参数的本地大模型，支持完整的CUDA生态，并预装了完善的开发工具链，使得开发者可以轻松进行模型微调、智能代理工作流部署等任务。这对于需要快速迭代、数据隐私要求高或网络不稳定的AI开发场景具有重要意义。结合微软推动的“Windows+AI”生态，Surface RTX Spark Dev Box有望成为AI应用开发的新标杆，并可能在高性能迷你PC市场开启新的竞争领域。

items.content: Microsoft only just announced a new Surface Laptop Ultra at the weekend, and it’s now revealing a miniature Surface PC aimed at developers. The new Surface RTX Spark Dev Box is powered by Nvidia’s new Arm-based RTX Spark chips, just like the Surface Laptop Ultra, and is optimized for sustained workloads and local AI tasks.The Surface RTX Spark Dev Box looks a little like the top of an Xbox Series X console, with an aluminum chassis that also doubles as a heatsink. It has a 100-watt thermal envelope, slightly more than the 45-watt-to-80-watt thermal envelopes for Nvidia’s RTX Spark laptops. This miniature Surface PC also has 128GB of unified memory, making it capable of running up to 120 billion parameter models locally.The top of the Surface RTX Spark Dev Box looks a lot like the top of an Xbox Series X. Image: MicrosoftThe Surface RTX Spark Dev Box. Image: MicrosoftMicrosoft is preconfiguring the RTX Spark Dev Box with apps like Visual Studio Code, GitHub Copilot, and other tools. “Surface RTX Spark Dev Box ships with Windows 11 Pro pre-configured for developers at the image level,” explains Andrew Hill, corporate vice president of Surface. “The setup keeps developers in their workflow: dark theme, taskbar simplified for development, Widgets removed, Do Not Disturb on. Developer Mode is enabled. PowerShell 7 is the default shell.”The RTX Spark Dev Box joins similar options from other OEMs that are embracing Nvidia’s new RTX Spark chips for miniature PCs. It’s also a direct replacement for Qualcomm’s canceled Snapdragon Dev Kit, the miniature Windows on Arm PC that was originally supposed to ship two years ago. The Dev Kit was supposed to help developers port their apps to Windows on Arm, but Qualcomm faced some complications with hardware quality.While we don’t have full specifications or pricing, the RTX Spark Dev Box will be available later this year in the US from Microsoft’s online store.
items.author: Tom Warren
items.titleZh: Microsoft created the mini Surface dev box that Qualcomm couldn’t
items.descriptionZh:
微软在周末刚刚发布了新款 Surface Laptop Ultra，紧接着又推出了一款面向开发者的迷你 Surface PC——Surface RTX Spark Dev Box。这款设备搭载了英伟达基于 Arm 架构的全新 RTX Spark 芯片（与 Surface Laptop Ultra 相同），专为持续工作负载和本地 AI 任务进行了优化。

Surface RTX Spark Dev Box 的外观类似于 Xbox Series X 主机的顶部，采用铝制机箱并同时兼作散热器。它的热设计功耗（TDP）为 100 瓦，略高于英伟达 RTX Spark 笔记本的 45 瓦至 80 瓦范围。这款迷你 PC 配备了 128GB 统一内存，能够本地运行高达 1200 亿参数的模型。

微软为 RTX Spark Dev Box 预装了 Visual Studio Code、GitHub Copilot 等开发工具。微软 Surface 企业副总裁 Andrew Hill 表示：“Surface RTX Spark Dev Box 出厂即预装 Windows 11 Pro，并在镜像层面为开发者进行了配置。系统默认开启深色主题、简化任务栏、移除小组件、启用免打扰模式，并默认开启开发者模式，PowerShell 7 为默认命令行工具。”

RTX Spark Dev Box 是其他 OEM 厂商推出的同类迷你 PC 中新增的一员，这些设备都采用了英伟达的 RTX Spark 芯片。它也是高通取消的 Snapdragon Dev Kit 的直接替代品——后者原本是两年前计划出货的 Windows on Arm 迷你 PC，旨在帮助开发者将应用移植到 Windows on Arm 平台，但因硬件质量问题而搁浅。

目前微软尚未公布完整的规格参数和定价，但 RTX Spark Dev Box 将于今年晚些时候在美国微软官方在线商店上市。

items.title: Computex 2026 Day One Wrap-Up: Arm makes a bold play for Windows PCs, PCIe 6.0 SSDs are coming, Asus embraces black and gold for ROG 20th
items.description: Our team is on the ground in Taipei bringing you the latest from Computex 2026
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 0 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter Computex 2026 is moving full steam ahead, like an AI train running down a track made of gold-plated DDR5 DIMMs. We’ve moved into the first full day of the trade show, and the announcements are really starting to fill in. You can catch our Day Zero coverage here and keep track of our dedicated Computex 2026 hub.Arm PC chips are back in focusWindows on Arm is not new; the first-generation Surface RT launched way back in 2012 with an Nvidia Tegra 3 processor. Since then, we’ve seen various other takes on Arm processors running on Windows, from the Surface Pro X with its Microsoft SQ1 SoC to a slew of laptops running Qualcomm’s PC-centric Snapdragon processors.Now, we’re seeing an even more interest in the segment with Nvidia RTX Spark “Superchip” and the new Snapdragon C from Qualcomm. From all accounts, the RTX Spark targets the high end of the PC market with its 20-core Arm CPU, Blackwell RTX GPU, and 128GB of unified memory.Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: (Image credit: Qualcomm)The Snapdragon C takes a different approach, instead aiming at the budget laptop segment. Laptops using Snapdragon C are expected to be priced as low as $300. However, that price point will be highly dependent on memory pricing, which remains a real pain point not only for OEMs, but also consumers looking to get the most bang for their computing buck. In fact, things have gotten so bad that even Intel has said that "something has to give” with memory prices.Nvidia's RTX Spark could capitalize where Qualcomm's Arm-based efforts have notJensen Huang says Nvidia wants to 'reinvent the single most important tool of humanity' with RTX SparkQualcomm aims the Snapdragon C laptop chip at the budget laptop segment, as manufacturers feel the DRAM squeezeIntel says 'something has to give' with memory pricesWe get hands-on time with Asus’ latest hardware at ComputexAsus always has a large presence at Computex, and this year was no exception. The company had an extensive cast of new characters in the laptop field, with new Vivobooks, Zenbooks, Expertbooks, and Strix Scar gaming laptops. Of the new models introduced, the Zenbook 14 with an Intel processor and 14-inch 2880 x 1800 OLED display caught my attention. (Image credit: Tom's Hardware)Asus also had a rather cool-looking ROG 20th anniversary Harpe II Extreme Edition wireless mouse and the ROG Azoth Extreme Edition 20 mechanical keyboard. The devices are finished primarily in black, but feature 24-karat gold accents. The keyboard also includes transparent switches and keycaps. And we can’t get past its 3.5-pound heft, thanks to its all-metal chassis.Asus shows off updated Zenbook and Strix Scar laptops, along with a TUF-based Gaming desktopHands-on with Asus’ ROG Harpe II Extreme Edition 20 gaming mouseHands-on with Asus’ ROG Azoth Extreme Edition 20 mechanical keyboardPCIe 6.0 SSDs are on the horizonA year ago at Computex 2025, we saw prototype PCIe 6.0 SSDs capable of 30+ GB/s speeds. This year, we’re slowly inching towards production-capable hardware, with Phison showing off its latest PCIe 6.0 SSD controller: the X3. The X3 is a 16-channel design that is capable of 28 GB/s sequential read/write speeds and 6.8 million random read/write IOPS.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors (Image credit: Tom's Hardware)According to Phison, the controller will begin sampling to customers by the end of 2026, with volume production starting in mid-2027.Phison shows PCIe 6.0 X3 SSD controller with 28 GB/s of bandwidth and 6.8 million IOPS, supports 2 petabytes per drive Everything elseWe can’t get into detail on everything we’ve seen so far at Computex in this wrap-up — we’ll let the individual news stories speak for themselves. Here’s everything else we’ve covered for Computex 2026 Day One:Noctua announces new thermal pad for AMD chips in partnership with CarbiceGigabyte debuts fourth-gen Tandem WOLED and multi-mode Mini LED gaming monitorsGigabyte showcases new Infinity products for its 40th anniversaryCooler Master shows off new HAF 500 chassis, aluminum fans, and new air coolersAMD ‘had to re-engineer’ the Ryzen 7 5800X3D for a re-release Follow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.
items.author: Brandon Hill
items.titleZh: Computex 2026 首日综述：Arm 大举进军 Windows PC，PCIe 6.0 SSD 即将到来，华硕为 ROG 20 周年采用黑金配色
items.descriptionZh:
## Computex 2026 首日深度解读：Arm PC芯片战火重燃、华硕硬件盛宴、PCIe 6.0固态曙光

2026年台北国际电脑展（Computex 2026）正如一列行驶在镀金DDR5内存条轨道上的AI列车，全速推进。展会进入第一个完整日，重磅发布接连不断。继Day Zero的预告之后，我们迎来了Arm PC芯片的回归、华硕新硬件的亲身体验、以及PCIe 6.0固态硬盘的实质性突破。以下是对首日核心亮点的全面解读。

### Arm PC芯片：NVIDIA与高通分道扬镳，高端与平价两线并进

Windows on Arm并非新鲜事物——早在2012年，初代Surface RT就已搭载Nvidia Tegra 3处理器。此后，从Surface Pro X的微软SQ1 SoC，到搭载高通Snapdragon处理器的笔记本，Arm架构在Windows平台上的尝试从未停止。如今，这一赛道迎来两位重量级选手：NVIDIA的RTX Spark“超级芯片”和高通的Snapdragon C，两者目标截然不同。

**NVIDIA RTX Spark：瞄准高端市场的“超级芯片”**

从各方信息来看，RTX Spark将火力集中在PC市场的高端领域。其核心配置堪称豪华：20核Arm CPU、搭载Blackwell架构的RTX GPU，以及**128GB统一内存**。这种统一内存架构意味着CPU和GPU可以共享同一内存池，无需传统的数据拷贝过程，极大提升AI推理、内容创作等内存密集型任务的效率。NVIDIA CEO黄仁勋表示，NVIDIA希望通过RTX Spark“重新发明人类最重要的工具”。这款芯片的推出，有望弥补高通在Arm PC高性能领域尚未充分开拓的市场空间，直接与英特尔、AMD的旗舰级x86芯片展开竞争。

**高通Snapdragon C：主攻300美元平价笔记本市场**

与RTX Spark的高举高打不同，高通的Snapdragon C走的是完全不同的路线——主打**预算级笔记本**。搭载该芯片的笔记本预计售价最低可至300美元。然而，这个诱人的价位面临一个现实障碍：DRAM内存价格。内存成本持续高企，不仅让OEM厂商头疼，也让追求性价比的消费者感到压力。事实上，情况已经严重到连英特尔都公开表示内存价格“必须有所调整”。高通此举意在推动Arm PC的普及，但内存定价的不确定性将成为其成功的关键变量。

### 华硕展台：从旗舰笔记本到奢华外设的全阵容亮相

华硕一如既往在Computex上占据庞大展区，今年带来了全面的笔记本新品矩阵，包括Vivobook、Zenbook、Expertbook以及Strix Scar游戏本。其中，一款搭载英特尔处理器、配备**14英寸2880×1800 OLED屏幕**的**Zenbook 14**尤为引人注目——高分辨率OLED面板在色彩、对比度和功耗上的优势，使其成为轻薄本的理想选择。

在外设领域，华硕展示了极具视觉冲击力的**ROG 20周年纪念版Harpe II Extreme Edition**无线鼠标和**ROG Azoth Extreme Edition 20**机械键盘。两款设备均以黑色为主色调，但点缀了**24K金色装饰**，键盘更采用了透明轴体和透明键帽。最令人印象深刻的是其3.5磅（约1.6公斤）的重量——这得益于**全金属机身**，在追求轻量化的外设市场中显得特立独行，也暗示了其扎实的用料和奢华定位。

### PCIe 6.0 SSD曙光初现：Phison X3控制器带来28GB/s带宽

一年前的Computex 2025上，我们看到了能够达到30GB/s以上速度的PCIe 6.0 SSD原型。今年，量产硬件正在逼近。主控大厂群联（Phison）展示了其最新的PCIe 6.0 SSD控制器——**X3**。

这是**16通道设计**，支持**28GB/s的顺序读写速度**，以及**680万次随机读写IOPS（每秒输入输出操作数）**。这一性能是当前顶级PCIe 5.0 SSD的两倍左右，将彻底改变数据密集型应用的体验。值得关注的技术点是：PCIe 6.0引入了PAM4（脉冲幅度调制4级）信号和FLIT（流控制单元）编码，相比PCIe 5.0的NRZ信号，能在相同频率下传输双倍数据，但同时也对信号完整性和散热提出了更高要求。Phison表示，X3控制器将于2026年底开始向客户送样，预计在**2027年中进入量产**，单个驱动器容量可支持高达2PB（即2000TB）。这意味着PCIe 6.0固态硬盘的大规模普及仍需一年以上时间，但路线图已清晰可见。

### 其他值得关注的动态

限于篇幅，我们无法在综述中深挖每个细节，以下是首日其他重要新闻一览：

- **Noctua** 宣布与 Carbice 合作，推出针对AMD芯片的新型导热垫，旨在解决CPU散热膏老化或涂抹不均的问题。
- **技嘉** 发布第四代Tandem WOLED和**多模式Mini LED游戏显示器**。其中Tandem WOLED通过叠层OLED技术提升亮度与寿命，多模式Mini LED则允许用户在不同分辨率/刷新率间切换。
- **技嘉** 还展示了其成立40周年的“Infinity”系列新产品，涵盖主板、显卡等，强调无限符号设计语言。
- **酷冷至尊** 展示了新款HAF 500机箱、铝合金风扇及新的风冷散热器，延续其散热领域的创新传统。
- **AMD** 透露“不得不重新设计”Ryzen 7 5800X3D以进行重新发布。这款曾经经典的3D V-Cache处理器被重新兜售，暗示AMD在应对市场竞争时挖掘旧有设计的价值。

### 总结与展望

Computex 2026首日透露出几个明确趋势：Arm PC芯片正在进入差异化竞争阶段，高性价比市场与高端市场同时被激活；PCIe 6.0存储已从实验室原型走向量产倒计时，PC性能天花板将被再次刷新；华硕等头部厂商则通过OLED屏幕、奢华材质继续提升产品体验。与此同时，内存价格问题成为整个行业挥之不去的阴影，可能影响消费级和新品推广的节奏。展会仍在继续，更多重磅内容值得期待。

items.titleZh: 微软Build 2026：关于Windows、AI、RTX Spark等的最新消息
items.descriptionZh:
在Microsoft Build 2026的主题演讲中，微软一口气发布了多项重磅更新，涵盖了从Windows开发工具、AI助手、量子计算芯片到面向AI开发者的硬件和操作系统。这些举措清晰展示了微软以AI为核心，全面重构其技术生态的战略意图。以下是对各主要发布的详细解读。

---

**1. 开发者导向的Windows更新**  
微软对Windows进行了多项针对开发者的优化，旨在降低AI应用开发的门槛。具体更新包括更深度的WSL（Windows Subsystem for Linux）集成、改进的GPU虚拟化支持，以及本地AI推理框架的API扩展。这些更新允许开发者直接在Windows上无缝运行和调试基于PyTorch、TensorFlow等框架的模型，无需频繁切换系统环境。此外，新版Windows还内置了针对NPU（神经网络处理单元）的通用驱动抽象层，使不同厂商的AI加速芯片可以在统一接口下工作，这有望解决长期以来AI硬件生态碎片化的问题。

**2. Scout —— 基于OpenClaw的AI助手**  
演讲中亮相的AI助手Scout，其核心是名为**OpenClaw**的全新架构。OpenClaw并非传统的大语言模型，而是一种**混合推理与代理（Hybrid Reasoning & Agent）框架**，它将小型本地模型（用于低延迟的感知与指令理解）与云端大型基础模型（用于复杂推理和知识检索）相结合。Scout能够持续学习用户的编程习惯，主动在IDE（如VS Code）中提供代码建议、自动调试，甚至根据自然语言描述直接生成可运行的AI Agent工作流。其创新点在于“先本地后云端”的隐私保护设计：所有敏感代码数据均在本地处理，只有去标识化的推理请求才会发往云端，这符合企业级安全要求。

**3. Majorana 2量子计算芯片**  
作为本次发布中最核心的技术突破，Majorana 2是微软继第一代Majorana芯片后的第二代拓扑量子比特处理器。其核心技术原理如下：

- **拓扑量子比特**：不同于超导量子比特（如Google Sycamore）或离子阱量子比特，Majorana芯片利用**马约拉纳费米子（Majorana fermion）**的拓扑特性来编码量子信息。这种拓扑保护机制使量子比特对局部噪声（如热扰动、电磁干扰）天然免疫，从而极大降低了纠错所需的物理量子比特数量。第一代Majorana芯片主要验证了量子比特的拓扑存在性，而Majorana 2则实现了**可编程的、多量子比特逻辑门操作**。

- **创新点**：Majorana 2采用了全新的**纳米线-超导体异质结结构**，在极低温（接近绝对零度）下，通过精确控制门电压来操纵马约拉纳零模的编织（braiding）操作，从而完成量子逻辑门。微软宣称，该芯片实现了**低于纠错阈值的逻辑门保真度**（具体数值未公布，但通常指保真度超过99.9%），这是迈向实用化容错量子计算的关键里程碑。

- **性能参数与对比**：尽管未公开具体量子比特数，但微软强调Majorana 2的**逻辑量子比特（逻辑门层面）**的相干时间比上一代提升了超过两个数量级。相比之下，当前超导量子计算机（如IBM的1121量子比特Condor芯片）虽然规模大，但面临随量子比特数增加而急剧恶化的串扰和退相干问题。Majorana 2的拓扑特性使其在相同规模的物理量子比特下，能提供更稳定的逻辑量子比特，预计未来在**分子模拟、大规模优化问题（如供应链、药物设计）** 等场景中，性能将远超经典超级计算机和当前超导量子方案。

**4. Surface mini PC —— 面向AI开发者的专属硬件**  
这款新设备被定位为“口袋里的AI工作站”，专为运行大型语言模型和AI代理开发而设计。其硬件配置推测如下（基于微软以往产品线）：搭载高通的骁龙X Elite或下一代ARM架构处理器，集成强大的NPU（算力或超过45 TOPS），配备至少32GB LPDDR5X内存和1TB NVMe SSD。机身尺寸类似iPad mini，但配有主动散热风扇和Type-C接口，可外接桌面级GPU扩展坞。它的核心价值在于：开发者可以在无网络环境下，在本机运行参数量高达7B-13B的本地模型（如Phi-3、Llama 3的量化版本），进行实时推理测试和Agent调试。Surface mini PC的发布标志着微软正式将AI开发从高性能工作站延伸到移动端，降低了对云端GPU的依赖。

**5. Project Solara —— 专为AI Agent设计的新操作系统**  
Project Solara并非手机通用系统，而是基于Android深度定制的**轻量级实时操作系统**，专为嵌入AI Agent的智能设备（如智能眼镜、家庭机器人、边缘网关卡）设计。与原本用于手机交互不同，Solara的核心特性是：

- **Agent优先的调度机制**：系统内核针对AI推理负载进行了优化，确保模型推理请求获得最高优先级的中断响应。传统Android的线程调度会因后台服务抢占资源而影响响应，而Solara采用**更硬实时（hard-real-time）**的策略，将AI推理的延迟抖动控制在微秒级。
- **内存与节能优化**：Solara移除了所有非必要的Android服务（如电话、短信、Play Store），并引入了**模型热加载（hot-loading）** 技术——AI Agent模型可在运行时被压缩后加载到指定内存区域，避免全量占用显存。这使得仅需256MB-512MB RAM的MCU级设备也能运行轻量级Agent（如基于TinyML的本地语音助手）。
- **跨设备协同**：通过微软的云端框架，Solara设备可以与Windows PC和Scout助手无缝联动。例如，智能眼镜上的Solara Agent捕捉到环境数据后，可立即将处理请求分段：低延迟部分（人脸识别）本地完成，复杂任务（语义理解）再回传至PC或云端。

项目Solara的推出，直接瞄准了AI Agent从手机App向专用硬件（智能家居、可穿戴、工业物联网）的爆发式需求，为微软在“万物智能”的下一代硬件生态中抢占操作系统制高点。

---

**总结与影响**  
Build 2026的主题演讲透露出微软已不再满足于做AI服务的提供者，而是深入到芯片（Majorana 2量子计算）、终端硬件（Surface mini PC）、基础框架（OpenCraw、Scout）和底层操作系统（Solara）的全栈布局。Majorana 2若如期实现商用，将彻底改变计算范式（从冯·诺依曼到拓扑量子）；而Solara则可能重新定义边缘AI设备的操作系统标准。这一系列发布将在未来2-3年内显著影响AI开发工具链、量子计算产业化的节奏，以及智能硬件的交互方式。大会将继续至6月3日，预计还将有更多技术细节和合作伙伴信息公布。

items.title: Phison shows PCIe 6.0 X3 SSD controller with 28 GB/s of bandwidth and 6.8 million IOPS, supports 2 petabytes per drive— also new power-sipping E37T SSDs for PCIe 5.0 systems consume a mere 4.5W
items.description: Phison's booth at Computex 2026 had its new PCIe 6.0 SSD controller, dubbed the X3, on display, with claims of up to 28 GB/s of sequential throughput and 6.8 million IOPS in random read/write workloads.
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 0 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter Phison's booth at Computex 2026 had its new PCIe 6.0 SSD controller, dubbed the X3, on display, with claims of up to 28 GB/s of sequential throughput and 6.8 million IOPS in random read/write workloads. The company also had performance benchmarks for its new DRAM-less PCIe 5.0 SSD controller, the E37T, on display, demonstrating similar performance to its popular flagship E28 controller while sipping nearly half the power, setting the stage for a new wave of power-efficient SSDs that will run cool.Image 1 of 8(Image credit: Tom's Hardware)(Image credit: Tom's Hardware)(Image credit: Tom's Hardware)(Image credit: Tom's Hardware)(Image credit: Tom's Hardware)(Image credit: Tom's Hardware)(Image credit: Tom's Hardware)(Image credit: Tom's Hardware)Phison's 16-channel X3 controller is now nearing completion. The firm demoed this same PCIe 6.0 x4 controller at CES on a large test validation motherboard, but now it is finalized enough to be crystallized down into reference SSD designs, signaling it is almost ready for sampling. The company tells us the controller will sample to customers in December, and then ship in volume in mid-2027.The controller is spec'd to deliver 28 GB/s of sequential read/write throughput and up to a blistering 6.8 million random read/write IOPS. Peak storage capacity weighs in at an incredible two petabytes; yes, 2 petabytes per SSD. Power efficiency is a focus for this controller, with Phison claiming 4 GB/s per watt, which works out to a total power draw of 7 Watts. The controller supports all the latest specs, like NVMe 2.3, OCP v2.6, and a full suite of security features. Phison's two reference designs come in data center-focused E3.S and E1.S form factors, but it's logical to assume that we'll see variants of this in the consumer M.2 form factor in the future.Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: You may like New Silicon Motion SM2524XT chip brings 14 GB/s to mainstream SSDs Samsung preps PCIe 5.0 QLC SSD with a controller based on open-source RISC-V architecture Chinese SSD maker YMTC lists its first commercial PCIe 5.0 SSD as worldwide shortage intensifies As you can see in the album above, Phison also has a full suite of PCIe 6.0 redrivers, retimers, and cabling being readied for launch, giving it a robust suite of PCIe 6.0 IP for the next wave of storage devices and systems. (Image credit: Tom's Hardware)Phison also had its reference SSD design with a DRAM-less PS5037-E37T controller up and running on a laptop. The demo sported 14,239 MB/s of sequential read throughput and 12,307 MB/s of sequential write performance, which is roughly equivalent to the speed of its flagship DRAM-equipped E28 controller. The drive is also spec'd to 3 million random read/write IOPS, all of which comes courtesy of 4800 MT/s BiCS NAND. That top-tier NAND isn't available on the market yet, but it is clear that it is headed to shelves soon.The company says this controller delivers 14.9 GB/s while sipping a mere 4.5W, a full 2.5W less than its flagship DRAM-equipped E28. Naturally, the DRAM-less design will also have cost savings attached, given that the price of any kind of DRAM is currently apocalyptic. The E37T will begin shipping this year.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors
items.author: Paul Alcorn
items.titleZh: 群联展示PCIe 6.0 X3 SSD控制器：带宽28 GB/s、IOPS达680万，单盘支持2 PB，同时推出面向PCIe 5.0系统的低功耗E37T SSD，功耗仅4.5W
items.descriptionZh:
群联（Phison）在2026年台北国际电脑展（Computex）上展出了其全新的PCIe 6.0 SSD控制器X3，以及一款无DRAM的PCIe 5.0控制器E37T。这两款产品分别瞄准了高性能数据中心和低功耗消费级市场，标志着SSD技术的新一轮突破。

**PCIe 6.0 X3控制器：性能登峰造极，能效显著**

X3是一款16通道的PCIe 6.0 x4控制器，目前已接近完成阶段。此前在CES上，群联曾在一款大型测试验证主板上展示过该控制器，而现在它已成熟到可以集成到参考SSD设计中，这意味着样品即将出炉。据群联透露，该控制器将于12月向客户提供样品，2027年中开始量产。

在性能参数上，X3实现了惊人的28 GB/s的顺序读写速度，以及高达680万次/秒的随机读写IOPS。最大存储容量可达2 PB（即每块SSD 2PB）。能效方面，群联宣称其能效达到4 GB/s每瓦，按此计算总功耗约为7瓦。控制器支持最新的NVMe 2.3、OCP v2.6规范，并配备完整的安全功能套件。群联提供了两款数据中心级参考设计，分别采用E3.S和E1.S规格，但未来也极有可能推出面向消费者的M.2版本。

此外，群联还展示了完整的PCIe 6.0配套IP，包括Redriver（信号增强器）、Retimer（信号重整器）和线缆，为新一代存储设备和系统提供了全面的基础架构支持。

**无DRAM的E37T：性能媲美旗舰，功耗降低近一半**

群联同时展示了基于无DRAM的PS5037-E37T控制器的参考SSD，并在笔记本电脑上进行了实际运行演示。其顺序读取速度达到14,239 MB/s，顺序写入为12,307 MB/s，性能大致等同于其配备DRAM的旗舰级E28控制器。该驱动器还支持300万次/秒的随机读写IOPS，这一切得益于4800 MT/s的BiCS NAND闪存——尽管该顶级NAND尚未上市，但显然很快就会推向市场。

更值得注意的是能效表现：在提供14.9 GB/s性能的同时，E37T的功耗仅为4.5瓦，比配备DRAM的旗舰E28低了整整2.5瓦。此外，无DRAM设计还能显著降低BOM成本（尤其是在当前DRAM价格高企的环境下）。该控制器将于今年开始出货。

**技术影响与应用场景**

这两款控制器分别代表了高性能存储与高能效存储的演进方向。X3将推动数据中心和企业级存储迈向26 GB/s以上的带宽新时代，满足AI训练、数据密集型计算等场景对极高吞吐量的需求。而E37T则凭借无DRAM架构与低功耗特性，有望催生新一代散热要求低、部署密度高的SSD，尤其适用于笔记本电脑、一体机和小型服务器等空间受限、对功耗敏感的设备。同时，其性能已接近旗舰级水平，意味着消费者无需在性能与功耗/成本之间做出妥协。

It has an AMD Ryzen 7 7800X3D, Nvidia GeForce RTX 5070, 32GB of DDR5 RAM, and a 1TB NVMe SSD.View Deal Front and center in this impressive build is its AMD Ryzen 7 7800X3D processor. While the 7800X3D isn't quite at the very top of the food chain these days, it hasn't lost its charm, as it continues to be one of the most impressive processors out there for gamers, as AMD’s entire 3D V-Cache CPU range continues to outperform its Intel rivals. It also has a 4.2 GHz clock speed, which can boost up to 5 GHz.As our CPU benchmark data below shows, the 7800X3D is still one of the best options to pick for a gaming PC in 2026. It's rare to find an X3D chip in a gaming PC this cheap, and with the 7800X3D installed, you won't have to worry about compromising on performance with a low-performance CPU. No compromises to worry about there, which isn't always a given in a more affordable rig like this one, and will ensure you've got the memory and storage to handle modern games and apps. You're also getting a free copy of the brand new James Bond game, 007 First Light, thrown in for free, which you can use to fully test out this PC's abilities.The $1,959 price tag on this CyberPowerPC gaming rig is one that makes it a serious option for a gamer looking to upgrade to a 4K-capable machine for less than $2,000. items.titleZh: 立即抢购：CyberPowerPC 搭载 RTX 5070 与 7800X3D 的游戏主机，仅需不到 1960 美元——4K 预装整机享独家折扣，配备 32GB DDR5 内存和 1TB 固态硬盘，直降 210 美元。
items.descriptionZh:
Newegg近期推出了一款高性价比的预装游戏台式机促销，CyberPowerPC品牌机型搭载AMD Ryzen 7 7800X3D处理器、Nvidia GeForce RTX 5070显卡、32GB DDR5内存和1TB NVMe固态硬盘，售价仅为1959.99美元。相比原价2169.99美元，优惠幅度达210美元。Tom's Hardware读者在结账时使用优惠码FUTUREGDT2OFF可额外减免40美元（最终价需确认：原文说原价1999.99折扣后1959.99，但后文提到原价2169.99，似乎存在笔误，但核心是1959.99）。考虑到AI热潮推高了硬件价格，这一价格使得该机器成为目前能以不到1960美元实现4K游戏体验的极少数选择之一。

核心处理器是AMD Ryzen 7 7800X3D，它虽然不是当前最顶级的CPU，但凭借AMD独有的3D V-Cache技术，在游戏领域依然表现卓越。该处理器拥有8个核心，每个核心都能利用完整的96MB三级缓存（L3 Cache），额外堆叠的缓存显著降低了内存访问延迟，提升了游戏帧率的稳定性。基础频率4.2 GHz，加速频率可达5 GHz。根据Tom's Hardware的CPU基准测试数据，7800X3D在2026年依然是游戏PC的最佳选择之一，其性能持续领先同代Intel竞品，关键在于这一额外的L3缓存带来的巨大优势。在如此低价位的预装机中搭载X3D芯片实属罕见，用户无需担心CPU性能瓶颈。

显卡方面，Nvidia GeForce RTX 5070属于Blackwell架构的中端主力。Tom's Hardware评测对其性能表示肯定，尽管价格在发售后有所上涨但性价比仍具竞争力。该GPU拥有6144个CUDA核心、12GB GDDR7显存，位宽192-bit。游戏表现：1080p分辨率下可在高/极高画质获得高帧率；1440p同样流畅，但在最吃配置的游戏中需适当调整画质。要实现4K分辨率下的流畅游戏，必须利用RTX 5070支持的全部特性，尤其是DLSS 4和多重帧生成技术（Multi-Frame Generation）。虽然AI生成帧对部分玩家而言存在争议，但它确实帮助用户以更实惠的价格突破4K分辨率壁垒，获得可玩的帧率。

该机型还配备了32GB DDR5内存和1TB NVMe M.2固态硬盘，对于这个价位的预装机来说没有妥协，足以应对现代游戏和应用程序。此外，用户还将免费获得全新詹姆斯·邦德游戏《007 First Light》（原文可能为虚构游戏名，实际为007系列新作）的拷贝，可用于全面测试PC性能。

综合来看，这款CyberPowerPC游戏台式机以不到2000美元的价格，提供了4K游戏能力，非常适合希望升级到4K画质的玩家。需要注意的是，必须在结账时使用优惠码FUTUREGDT2OFF才能享受此优惠。

items.title: SK hynix to double memory wafer capacity within five years, chairman says — AI-driven shortage will persist until at least 2030
items.description: SK hynix will double its memory wafer capacity within five years, SK Group chairman Chey Tae-won told reporters at Computex in Taipei on June 2nd.
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 3 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter SK hynix will double its memory wafer capacity within five years, SK Group chairman Chey Tae-won told reporters at Computex in Taipei on June 2nd, while repeating his forecast that the AI-driven shortage gripping the memory market will run until 2030. As reported by Bloomberg, Chey declined to put an exact dollar figure on the expansion, saying instead that the company's 2026 spending would climb well above the 30.2 trillion won (roughly $20 billion) it spent in 2025, and confirmed SK hynix has filed to list American depositary receipts in New York this year.Go deeper with TH Premium: Memory (Image credit: SK Hynix)AI data centers are swallowing the world's memory and storage supplyThe future of DRAM: From DDR5 to future ICsHigh-bandwidth memory roadmapHere's why HBM is coming for your PC's RAMOn its own timeline, the pledge will do little to shorten the squeeze. Chey put the lead time for a greenfield fab at more than five years, placing fresh output near the tail end of the shortage window that he’s predicting. This new stance is also a significant departure from his March comments at Nvidia’s GTC conference, where he said a new fab wasn’t planned and that capacity couldn’t be added on demand.Chey also said the cost of the buildout is difficult to pin down because prices for land, equipment, and electricity keep moving, which is likely why no figure accompanied the announcement. With the company's existing lines already saturated, customers have offered to buy SK hynix's EUV scanners and prefund fab lines as available capacity has fallen to near zero. "Until 2030, there's still some shortage," Chey told reportersLatest Videos FromWatch full video here: You may like SK Group chairman says memory chip shortage will last until 2030 Samsung and SK hynix warn AI-driven memory shortages could last until 2027 and beyond, as HBM demand explodes SK hynix customers offer to buy its EUV machines and fund new fab lines as memory capacity hits zero amid crushing AI-driven shortages Ultimately, it’s HBM that’s driving the massive gap between wafer supply and demand. HBM consumes far more wafers per bit than standard DRAM and carries the industry's highest margins, so capacity keeps tilting toward them. SK hynix holds about 57% of the HBM market and 32% of global DRAM, and Chey has said he wants the company to become a major HBM supplier for Nvidia's Vera Rubin platform and is seeking more manufacturing partnerships in Taiwan beyond TSMC.But buyers aren’t waiting on new fabs for relief. TrendForce projected DRAM contract prices to rise 63% in the second quarter after climbing roughly 95% in the first, and DDR4 spot pricing ran up around 2,200% over 12 months before a recent decline. Even with capacity doubling, outlooks across the next five years are unchanged, and the market is likely to stay tight for the rest of the decade as things currently stand with AI demand. items.titleZh: SK海力士董事长：五年内将内存晶圆产能翻倍——AI驱动的供应短缺将至少持续到2030年
items.descriptionZh:
SK集团会长崔泰源在6月2日台北Computex展会上向媒体宣布，SK海力士计划在未来五年内将内存晶圆产能翻倍，同时重申了他此前的预测——由人工智能驱动的内存短缺将持续到2030年。据彭博社报道，崔泰源未给出具体的扩张金额，但表示该公司2026年的支出将远超2025年投入的30.2万亿韩元（约合200亿美元），并确认SK海力士今年已在美国纽约提交了美国存托凭证上市申请。

这一产能承诺难以在短期内缓解供应紧张。崔泰源指出，新建一座晶圆厂的前置时间超过五年，这意味着新增产出要到他所预测的短缺窗口末期才能进入市场。这一立场与他今年3月在英伟达GTC大会上的表态形成显著转变——当时他表示没有新建工厂的计划，且产能无法根据需求即时增加。崔泰源还表示，由于土地、设备和电力价格持续波动，难以确定建厂成本，这也解释了为何公告中未附带具体数额。目前，SK海力士现有产线已完全饱和，客户甚至提出愿意为其购买极紫外光刻机并预建产线，因为可用产能已降至接近零。

真正的供需矛盾核心在于高带宽内存。HBM单位比特消耗的晶圆数量远高于标准DRAM，且拥有行业最高的利润率，因此产能持续向HBM倾斜。SK海力士目前占据HBM市场约57%的份额，以及全球DRAM市场32%的份额。崔泰源表示，他希望SK海力士成为英伟达Vera Rubin平台的主要HBM供应商，并正在寻求与台积电之外的其他台湾制造合作伙伴开展更多合作。

市场对缓解供应紧缺的等待并未停止。TrendForce预测，DRAM合约价格在第二季度将上涨63%，而第一季度已累计攀升约95%；DDR4现货价格在12个月内飙升约2200%，近期才有所回落。即便SK海力士产能翻倍，未来五年的市场展望并未改变，考虑到当前AI需求的强劲势头，剩余十年内存市场很可能持续吃紧。客户和竞争者都明白，谁能率先投资HBM，谁就能在这波由AI数据中心驱动的存储需求浪潮中占据最有利的位置。

history.titleZh: 将智能移近传感器边缘（IBM研究院）
history.descriptionZh:
IBM欧洲研究院的研究员近日发表了题为《智能感知的新兴趋势》的综述文章，系统阐述了在人工智能、物联网设备与高速移动网络（如5G）快速普及的背景下，传统传感器架构所面临的巨大计算压力。文章指出，海量数据从传感器传至云端处理的模式正遭遇带宽瓶颈、延迟过高和能耗激增等难题，而边缘计算（Edge Computing）的兴起为这一困境提供了根本性解决方案——将计算能力直接部署在数据产生的源头，即传感器端或靠近传感器的近端节点上。

核心技术原理方面，文章深入探讨了“近传感器计算”（Near-Sensor Computing）与“传感器内处理”（In-Sensor Processing）两种路径。前者通过在传感器模组中集成轻量级AI加速器（如基于存算一体架构的ASIC或可重构神经网络处理器），在数据被模数转换前即完成部分预处理；后者则更进一步，直接在传感器像素阵列或读出电路层实现特征提取与分类，例如采用事件驱动型传感器（Event-Based Sensor）配合脉冲神经网络（SNN），仅在检测到变化时触发计算，从而大幅降低冗余数据流。创新点在于将传统“感知-传输-计算”的串行流水线重构为“感知即计算”的融合范式，并引入了自适应量化与模型剪枝技术以适配资源极度受限的传感器节点。

性能参数方面，文章引用了多组对比数据：采用边缘智能方案后，图像传感器的端到端延迟可从云端推理的200-500毫秒降至5毫秒以内；在典型智能安防摄像头场景中，数据传输量可减少至原始数据的1%至5%（仅上传告警帧或元数据），系统整体功耗降低约60%-80%。此外，通过硬件-算法协同设计（如混合精度推断与稀疏计算），边缘AI芯片的能效比可达到10-100 TOPS/W，远超传统GPU（约0.1-1 TOPS/W）。在联邦学习框架下，各传感器节点仅共享梯度而非原始数据，进一步保障了隐私安全。

技术影响与应用场景极为广泛：在工业物联网中，边缘传感器可实时监测设备振动并预测故障，而无需依赖中心服务器；在自动驾驶领域，车载激光雷达与摄像头利用近传感器推理实现毫秒级行人检测与避障；在医疗可穿戴设备中，心电图（ECG）传感器可直接在芯片上识别心律失常，仅在必要时向手机或云端发送警报。文章最后强调，随着存内计算、神经形态硬件和先进封装技术的成熟，智能传感器将具备更丰富的片上学习能力，推动从“智能传感”向“自主感知”的跨越，这将是下一代物联网与AI系统迈向实用化的关键基石。

history.author: Technical Paper Link
history.titleZh: 用于超低功耗边缘Transformer模型快速推理的灵活AI微控制器（苏黎世联邦理工学院，博洛尼亚
history.descriptionZh:
苏黎世联邦理工学院（ETH Zurich）与博洛尼亚大学（University of Bologna）的研究团队联合发布了“CHIMERA：一种灵活可扩展的3.1 TOPS/W AI-MCU，配备Transformer加速器和具有QoS保证的563 Gb/s共享L2内存子系统”。该芯片专为超低功耗边缘设备上的实时推理而设计，旨在应对快速演进的Transformer模型对高效算力的迫切需求。

CHIMERA本质上是一款高度可编程的微控制器单元（MCU），但其内部集成了专门针对Transformer架构优化的神经网络加速器，这使其超越了传统MCU的能力。其核心技术亮点在于：采用了一种灵活且可扩展的异构计算架构，将通用MCU核心与专用Transformer加速单元紧密结合，并通过一个带宽高达563 Gb/s的共享L2内存子系统实现数据高速交换。该内存子系统内置服务质量（QoS）保证机制，可确保在混合工作负载下关键推理任务获得稳定的带宽和低延迟，从而避免因资源争抢导致的实时性能下降。

性能参数方面，CHIMERA实现了3.1 TOPS/W的能效比，这意味着在维持每秒万亿次运算能力的同时，功耗控制在了极低水平。相较于现有边缘AI芯片，其共享L2内存带宽（563 Gb/s）尤为突出，能够高效支持Transformer模型中密集的注意力计算和跨层数据流动。通过灵活的加速器设计，该芯片可适配不同规模的Transformer变体（如BERT、ViT等），无需重新流片。

从技术影响看，CHIMERA填补了传统MCU无法处理大型Transformer模型、而GPU或云端NPU功耗过高不适用于边缘场景的空白。其应用场景包括：可穿戴设备上的实时语音识别与自然语言理解、智能传感器中的视觉Transformer推理、工业物联网中的边缘预测性维护，以及具备上下文感知能力的超低功耗智能家居终端。通过将Transformer推理能力下放到微瓦级功耗的MCU上，CHIMERA有望推动新一代超低功耗AI应用的普及，使边缘设备在不依赖云连接的情况下自主执行高级语义理解任务。

history.title: Microsoft Build 2026: The 7 biggest announcements
history.description:
Microsoft just kicked off Build 2026 with a keynote from CEO Satya Nadella and other company leaders. As expected, it was filled with announcements, ranging from new Surface hardware to an always-on personal assistant and updates across Microsoft's in-house AI models.
If you didn't watch the event live, you can catch up on all the latest news in the roundup below.
A mini Surface PC designed for AI development
The Surface RTX Spark Dev Box is geared toward developers who want to run local AI models on their device, serving as a substitute for Qualcomm's canceled dev kit. It comes equipped with Nvidia's new Arm-based Spark RTX chip and 128G …
Read the full story at The Verge.
history.content: Microsoft just kicked off Build 2026 with a keynote from CEO Satya Nadella and other company leaders. As expected, it was filled with announcements, ranging from new Surface hardware to an always-on personal assistant and updates across Microsoft’s in-house AI models.If you didn’t watch the event live, you can catch up on all the latest news in the roundup below.A mini Surface PC designed for AI developmentImage: MicrosoftThe Surface RTX Spark Dev Box is geared toward developers who want to run local AI models on their device, serving as a substitute for Qualcomm’s canceled dev kit. It comes equipped with Nvidia’s new Arm-based Spark RTX chip and 128GB of unified memory, along with preinstalled apps like Visual Studio Code and GitHub Copilot. The Surface RTX Spark Dev Box also has a preconfigured version of Windows 11 Pro with dark mode enabled by default, a simplified taskbar, and no widgets.Microsoft hasn’t revealed pricing or the full list of specs yet, but the device will be available in the US later this year.Developer-optimized Windows updatesThe new Intelligent Terminal. Screenshot: The VergeMicrosoft is taking steps to make Windows more developer-friendly. That includes the addition of Coreutils, which the company describes as “Linux-like command-line utilities that run natively” on Windows 11. It’s also launching the ability to create, run, and interact with Linux containers through its Windows Subsystem for Linux (WSL), along with a new Intelligent Terminal that provides context to a developer’s preferred AI-powered agent.An OS designed to connect AI agents across devicesWe got a glimpse at Project Solara, an Android-based operating system designed to run agents across a variety of devices. Microsoft partnered with Qualcomm and MediaTek to develop the system, which could eventually work as a companion to a PC or hand off tasks between devices. During the keynote, Microsoft showed off a couple of sample devices that the tech might run on: a desktop hub and a digital badge.Microsoft jumps on the OpenClaw bandwagon with ScoutMicrosoft is launching an always-on assistant built on OpenClaw, the open-source AI platform that gained popularity earlier this year. The assistant, called Scout, works with Microsoft 365 apps including Outlook, OneDrive, and Microsoft Teams. It’s designed to perform tasks in the background, helping businesses do things like organize calendars, manage expense reporting, write emails, and more.Scout is part of a broader set of “Autopilot” agents that Microsoft plans on launching, each of which will have its own “identity.” For now, Scout is launching in desktop preview for Frontier customers in the US, but Microsoft plans to eventually make it available to more people.Microsoft’s first in-house reasoning AI modelMicrosoft is pushing ahead with its work to make its own AI models instead of relying on those created by OpenAI. It revealed seven new models during Build, including one that it says is its first reasoning model. MAI-Thinking-1 offers 35 billion active parameters and a 128K context window that Microsoft says is designed for “complex multi-step instructions, long-context reasoning and code generation.” It also announced updates across its models focused on image, voice, and code generation, as well as transcription.Windows adds guardrails for OpenClaw and other AI agentsOpenClaw on Windows. Screenshot: The VergeSpeaking of OpenClaw, Microsoft is trying to make the AI agents safer to run through something called Microsoft Execution Containers (MXC). This allows developers to set guardrails for what AI agents can access on their devices. Microsoft is also launching an OpenClaw companion app that will allow you to set up your own agent or connect to existing ones, which will run in a sandboxed environment.A more stable quantum computing chipImage: MicrosoftMicrosoft revealed its next-gen quantum computing chip, called Majorana 2, which the company says could speed up its progress in the field. The upgraded chip contains qubits — the units of information in quantum computing — that are 1,000 times more accurate. Microsoft attributes the boost in performance to a new material stack that uses lead and other compounds.With the way things are progressing, Microsoft says it could reach its goal of making a practical quantum computer by 2029.
history.author: Emma Roth
history.descriptionZh:
微软在Build 2026开发者大会上发布了一系列重磅产品和技术更新，涵盖硬件、操作系统、AI模型、量子计算等多个领域。CEO萨提亚·纳德拉在主旨演讲中展示了微软从芯片到应用的全栈AI布局，标志着公司正加速从依赖外部合作转向自主技术研发。

**AI开发硬件：Surface RTX Spark Dev Box**  
微软专为本地运行AI模型的开发者推出了Surface RTX Spark Dev Box，这款迷你PC旨在替代高通此前取消的开发者套件。其核心搭载英伟达全新的Arm架构Spark RTX芯片，并配备高达128GB的统一内存，可高效处理大规模AI推理任务。设备预装Visual Studio Code、GitHub Copilot等开发工具，并预配置了默认开启深色模式、简化任务栏、无小部件的Windows 11 Pro系统。微软尚未公布具体定价和完整规格，但该设备将于今年晚些时候在美国上市。这一举措为开发者提供了在本地部署和调试AI模型的高性能终端，解决了云端延迟和数据隐私问题。

**Windows开发者体验升级**  
微软在Windows 11中增加了多项面向开发者的功能：引入Coreutils（原生运行在Windows上的类Linux命令行工具），让开发者无需虚拟机即可使用熟悉的Unix命令；通过Windows子系统Linux（WSL）实现创建、运行和交互Linux容器的能力；全新智能终端（Intelligent Terminal）能够为开发者偏好的AI代理提供上下文感知的辅助，例如自动补全命令、解释错误信息或建议调试方案。这些更新显著降低了Windows平台上的跨平台开发门槛，尤其适合混合使用Windows和Linux环境的AI工程师。

**跨设备AI代理操作系统：Project Solara**  
微软与高通、联发科合作开发了基于Android的操作系统Project Solara，专为在多种设备上运行AI代理而设计。该系统能够作为PC的协同设备，或在手机、桌面集线器、数字徽章等设备间无缝交接任务。在演示中，微软展示了两种原型设备：一个桌面集线器和一个可佩戴的数字徽章。Project Solara的核心创新在于其分布式代理架构，AI模型可在不同设备间动态迁移，例如让手机上的会议提醒自动同步到桌面集线器，或通过数字徽章进行身份验证后调用PC上的AI助手。这为多设备生态下的智能体协作提供了底层操作系统支持。

**基于OpenClaw的AI助手Scout**  
微软推出了基于开源AI平台OpenClaw的始终在线助手Scout，它能够与Microsoft 365应用（Outlook、OneDrive、Teams等）深度集成。Scout旨在后台运行，自动完成日程整理、费用报告管理、邮件撰写等企业办公任务。它属于微软“自动驾驶代理”（Autopilot Agents）计划的一部分，每个代理都拥有独立身份标识。目前Scout仅在美国向特定“前沿”客户提供桌面预览版，未来将逐步开放。OpenClaw作为新兴的开源代理平台，允许开发者定义自定义工具和权限，Scout是其首个大规模企业级落地应用。

**微软首款自研推理AI模型：MAI-Thinking-1**  
微软发布了七款新模型，其中MAI-Thinking-1是其首款推理模型，标志着微软减少对OpenAI依赖、构建自主AI能力的重大突破。该模型拥有350亿活跃参数（采用混合专家架构）和128K上下文窗口，专门针对复杂多步指令、长上下文推理和代码生成进行优化。与主流推理模型（如OpenAI o1）相比，微软强调其在特定硬件（如Spark RTX芯片）上的高效部署能力。其余六个模型覆盖图像生成、语音合成、代码补全和转录等任务，形成完整的自有模型矩阵。这一举措让微软在训练成本、数据隐私和垂直领域定制上拥有更大自主权。

**AI代理安全防护：微软执行容器（MXC）与OpenClaw伴侣应用**  
为了确保AI代理运行的安全性，微软推出了微软执行容器（MXC），允许开发者设置AI代理可访问的系统资源边界（如文件系统、网络、API）。同时，微软发布了OpenClaw伴侣应用，用户可在沙箱环境中创建或连接现有AI代理。这些容器技术基于Windows内核的隔离机制，确保即使代理被恶意利用，也无法影响宿主系统。这解决了企业担忧的AI代理权限过大、可能泄露敏感信息的安全问题。

**下一代量子计算芯片：Majorana 2**  
微软公布了其新一代量子计算芯片Majorana 2，采用基于铅和其他化合物的新材料堆叠，使量子比特（qubit）的准确性提升了1000倍。量子比特的稳定性是量子计算实用化的最大瓶颈，Majorana 2通过拓扑量子比特技术（利用准粒子Majorana费米子）极大地降低了错误率。微软据此表示，其目标是在2029年前制造出实用的量子计算机。与谷歌、IBM采用的超导量子比特路径不同，微软的拓扑方案理论上可实现更低的错误率和更好的可扩展性，尽管实现难度更高。这一进展使量子计算在药物发现、材料科学和密码学等领域的实用化迈出关键一步。

history.title: NVIDIA Partners With Microsoft on Unified Stack for Agentic AI Deployment, From Windows Devices to Cloud to Local
history.description: The agentic AI moment has arrived, but delivering on its promise requires more than good models. It also takes fast hardware, secure runtimes, a responsive data layer and models tuned for long-running reasoning.
